entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v5.0.0.post5
entry.content:
# Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Added, changed, and removed various Chatsanity and Cutscenesanity Checks, primarily within Chapter 3. - Slightly changed the logic for some of the Catacombs Checks, since you need to pick up the Hyperball (and therefore have it) to continue past the Slasher. - Added the Bounce Tool as an Item, and made it logically required for the end of the Catacombs onwards. - Added "Builderman" as an Item, and made him logically required for the Dream World onwards. - Fixed a few room names that were changed in Demo 5 to be their correct names. Most of this was done already, but a few slipped by during the last pre-release.
### Next stop: Chapter 4...

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v5.0.0.post6
entry.content:
# Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Added some of Chapter 4's Content, up to the Pirate Camp. - This also includes a temporary Goal Option, where you have to get to the Pirate Camp/Vermillion Village to win. Obviously, this will later be replaced with finishing Chapter 4. - Some of Chapter 4's Chatsanity has been completed, although not all of it. This will likely be finished sometime after 5.0.0 is finished, to save myself a headache and prevent this from taking even longer to release. - There might be another minor change or two I forgot.
Next on the docket is the Griefer sidequest and continuing Chapter 4. Once almost everything (except for the Chatsanity) is finished, we'll be in the Release Candidate (RC) phase, meaning a stable release of 5.0.0 will be right around the corner. Stay tuned...

entry.title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus v0.3.4a0
entry.content:
Various bugfixes and other QoL content, much of it courtesy of @amondovagyok.
- The Sly 1 Client now has a proper title, as well as in-built Universal Tracker support. - Reduced frequency of various read-write operations, to hopefully address various crashes. - Added a new option to host.yaml, "Auto Fill Locations". Enabled by default. - When enabled, if a Sly 1 player has more items than locations, the apworld will create bonus "Cache" locations when collecting Keys to address this. This will prevent errors caused by excessive items. - If disabled, generation will give an OptionsError. - Added a manifest file for compatibility with Archipelago 0.7.0 and onward.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.6.1
entry.content:
## Meth Related Removed Acid, phosphorus, chemistry station and lab oven from level reward unlocks. They have been removed from level up rewards in the latest Schedule-1 update
## Bug Fixes Fixed banning progression items not working properly

entry.title: UNBEATABLE Arcade v0.4.0a0
entry.content:
This ~~overdue~~ update catches up to some additions to the game and adds a couple QOL features and bug fixes. Contributions thanks to @estradiol-valerate and @LeftoverHotdish!
- Added new songs: `do no harm` and `it's time to do crimes` - Replaced the advanced "Allow PFC" YAML option with a more customizable cap to expected accuracy for logic - Scrolling the AP console will no longer scroll the song list at the same time - Fixed a bug when using certain unique stages - Fixed a bug that broke UI after getting >100 rating
Check [the README](https://github.com/AllPoland/unbeatAP/blob/main/README.md) for installation instructions.
**Please read the YAML options carefully and test your options before joining a lobby**, since the pacing and difficulty of the apworld is very volatile. It's currently very easy to make a randomizer that is way too short or way too long.
Any feedback or ideas are welcome in the "UNBEATABLE (PC)" thread in `#future-game-design` in the [Archipelago Discord](https://discord.gg/8Z65BR2)!

entry.title: Factorio - Space Age Without Space v0.9.0
entry.content: ## 0.9.0 * Added new yaml option: `free_power`. This enables Fulgoran lightning on Nauvis, and adds the Lightning Rod and Lightning Collectors to the tech tree. * Added small amounts of Copper and Iron Stromatolites to the map generation. They can be found near gleba water, and are hopefully a useful early-game source of ore. * Pulled /toggle_connection_change_filter into SAWS

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.1.0
entry.content:
# New Features * DexNav * Spend 30+ coins to guarantee a specific Pokémon that can be found in a location * Single Board Option * Reduces the game to only your starting board, removing * Evo Mode Option * Evo Mode can now be 3 arrows in the pool, 1 singular item in the pool, or started with. These apply alongside evolution items. * Difficulty Option * When set, certain "soft" logic requirements are relaxed * Collect Pokédex Option * When enabled, Pokédex locations will be affected by collect. This can allow goaling from collects if all goals are Pokédex-related. * Same Slot Co-op * Pokédex catches are saved to data storage and will sync across concurrent players on the same slot * RingLink * Send and receive coins from other players playing RingLink-compatible games such as SMW or SA2B * New Items * Evolution Items * Evolution is now locked by individual items based on the Pokémon's evolution method * Helper Pokémon * Makuhita, Whiscash, Zigzagoon, and Pelipper have all been added to the item pool * Coin Arrows * Coin arrows are now added to the item pool. * Double Coin Modifier * Doubles coins received from coin arrows.
# Bug Fixes * Fixed Latios and Latias logically being considered for the opposite board * Fixed score goaling being just, completely broken * Fixed score items resetting current score in certain cases * Fixed an issue where one could travel to Ruins via normal travel on the Ruby Board * Fixed Ruins Area Card giving access to the Ruins before it is unlocked * Fixed Ruins Area Card giving access to Forest and Volcano/Lake before they are unlocked * Fixed an issue where most egg Pokémon would be uncatchable on the Ruby Board * Fixed an edge case where having the opposite board's egg bunch would guarantee Pichu to hatch * Fixed an issue where Clamperl would not consider its evolutions in its spawn rate until you have 3 starting balls
# Other Changes * Changed evolutions to only require BasicPinball * Rayquaza bonus stage/capture can be considered logical early with Ruins Area Card * Rare encounters can now be considered in logic if Rayquaza capture is in logic * Client commands now check for equality using title casing

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.5.post2
entry.content: Experimental feature! It's kinda terrible to play with in big sessions lol ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.5) * Requires a new seed to be generated ## Changes * Implemented DamageLink (named SharedDamage for tagging purposes) * Whenever players take a hit they send a Damage signal to others * Can be toggled in the Manager * Currently Waffles handles it like this: * Other Waffles players get hurt when the cumulative damage gets to 80 * Sends a 80 damage signal when the player loses a powerup, loses a heart or dies * Sends a 20 damage signal when the player loses Yoshi * Removed RingLink handling from the code (didn't work on Waffles) * Made Universal Tracker aware of the Decoupled options

entry.title: Mega Man X v1.6.1.post2
entry.content: This was an absolute nightmare to playtest in a group session. I'd do it again tho. ## Info * [General info](https://thelx5.github.io/mmx/index.html) * [Setup](https://thelx5.github.io/mmx/setup.html) * Additional client commands are implemented, use `/help` to see which commands are available ## Changes * Implemented DamageLink (named SharedDamage for tagging purposes) * Whenever players take a hit they send a Damage signal to others * Currently MMX handles it like this: * Other MMX players get hurt when the cumulative damage gets to 10 * Can receive up to 12 HP worth of damage at once * Respects `Body Upgrade` added defense * Sends 10 damage to players per HP lost * Players no longer receive items or DeathLinks during the level intro (falling from the sky) * Players now go directly to the Game Clear screen once Sigma is defeated (removes credits sequence) * Optimized Sigma Opening logic code from the ROM side (should experience slightly less lag overall) * This forces you to watch the Progress Screen in order to process Sigma's Fortress unlocking criteria * Made the intro sequence skip directly to the main menu after the CAPCOM logo * Dashed lemons now appear green instead of yellow/orange * ~~Stole~~ Copied Mega Man 1/2/3's way to extract ROMs from the X Legacy Collection executable file

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country 2 v3.1.1.post2
entry.content: New experimental thing 👁️ ### Download trivia here (mandatory to play, not to generate): <https://github.com/TheLX5/DKC2-Trivia/releases/latest> # Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc2/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc2/changelog/#3.1.1) # Changes * Implemented DamageLink (named SharedDamage for tagging purposes) * Whenever players take a hit they send a Damage signal to others * Can be toggled in the Manager * Currently DKC2 handles it like this: * Other DKC2 players get hurt when the cumulative damage gets to 80 * Sends a 80 damage signal when the player gets hurt in any way, including extra hits * Apparently the *Link options in the manager did absolutely nothing, that's now fixed * Replaced bundled docs' text with links to my WIP webpage.

entry.title: Everhood 2 v0.4.6
entry.content:
> [!IMPORTANT] > While many softlocks have been fixed. Some softlocks may still occur. Some areas were untested such as Green Route 3 and many Hilbert Hotel rooms. Please bring my attention to them in Discord if they occur.
> [!NOTE] > Minimum version of the APWorld is now 0.6.7. > THE APWORLD HAS NO UPDATE FOR THIS RELEASE, IT DOES NOT NEED TO BE UPDATED.
See 0.4.2 patch notes for the main changes: https://github.com/DeamonHunter/ArchipelagoEverhood2/releases/tag/v0.4.2
## AP World fixes - Fixed several soft locks that could occur if a location was collected: (Thanks DJN for providing files to diagnose this issue) - `Yellow Mask` (Softlock fix was added) - `V.I.P. Ticket` (Softlock fix was added) - `Death Mountain King Gordo Reward` (No Fix added. Was unsure if it did softlock.) - `Dragon Soul Weapon` (No Fix added. Was unsure if it did softlock.) - Prevented the following items being given by default (If the location was done already): - V.I.P Ticket - Yellow Mask - All Weapons
There may be more cases of these issues that need to be fixed.
# Installation ## Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
> You can find Everhood 2's folder by finding the game in your steam library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*.
### Windows 1. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.exe` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Select Everhood 2 in the list of games. - If Everhood 2 does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `Everhood 2 .exe`. 3. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Linux 1. Navigate to Everhood 2 on steam, open properties and add the following to Launch Options: `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="version=n,b" %command%` 2. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.Linux` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. - You may need to give it permissions to execute. 3. Select Everhood 2 in the list of games. - If Everhood 2 does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `Everhood 2.exe`. 4. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
## Mod Install
1.Download `ArchipelagoEverhood.zip`. 2. Head to the Everhood 2 folder and open up `/mods/`. If this folder does not exist, run the game and it should appear. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. Ensure the files are not in a subfolder, this mod is not setup for that yet. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.2.0
entry.content:
## New Features - Mother Maiamai may now give 9 checks. Each requires a Ravio item and also has a maiamai threshold that must be reached before the item can be obtained. Use option `shuffle_maiamai_rewards` to control whether Mother Maiamai checks are included, and use option `maiamai_limit` to set the maximum possible number of required maiamai. - Hint ghosts now provide hints. Set `hint_ghosts` to `always` to enable them, or set to `glasses` to enable them once you have received the Hint Glasses. - Death Link is now an available option. (@Bloonie) - New `initial_crack_state` option `progressive` replaces the bracelets with two Progressive Merge items. The first one you get gives you the activated bracelet, and the second one gives you the quake that opens the cracks. - Option `priority_bosses` makes all boss heart containers into priority locations. - Setting `mod_path` in `host.yaml` to the path to your Azahar `load/mods` folder or your `luma/titles` folder allows the patcher to install the mod automatically (optional).
## Changes - Accessing the Eastern Palace boss without both small keys is moved to Hard logic. - Option `minigames_excluded` now removes minigame locations from the pool. - Desert Palace logic changed to prevent a self-locking key. - Region hint names changed to match standalone randomizer hints.
## Fixes - Fixed an error when running from WebHost. - Improved speed of pre_fill step.

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.2.1
entry.content: The previous release came with the wrong version of the library, this release fixes that.

entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.0
entry.content:
## Changes
* We now use semver! Gone are the days of single version numbers (and multiple changes after a version release without a new version)! * There is now logic to account for missile ammo and power bomb ammo! More info in the attached changelog * So many logic fixes it's hard to list them all! Here's the main two: * * Sector 2 (TRO) should no longer expect you to descend without bombs/power bombs * * Sector 3 (PYR) Fiery Storage should no longer expect you to be able to access it as soon as you can enter S3 * * For a more complete list of fixes look at the changelog * Items in a multiworld for Metroid: Zero Mission should now correctly use sprites. * * Currently looking into the blank sprite issue for other games.
## Future
* More start locations! * New Trick settings are being staged for future release versions but are not yet available. Look forward to seeing the following in the future: * * Wall Jump - Expert * * Shinespark - Expert * * Midair Morph - Beginner, Advanced, and Expert * * Damage Runs (full implementation)
As usual, many thanks to @NPCPotPie for all their work!
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.1
entry.content:
## Changes
* S2 Logic fixes: * * When PONR checks are disabled, accessing Zig-Zag-Zone from Data Courtyard (@NPCPotPie) and from Left Side now requires being able to ball jump, in order to be able to return the same way you got there. * * When PONR checks are disabled, accessing Lower S2 from Dessgeega Dorm now requires being able to hi-jump/space jump, in order to be able to return the same way.
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: Dead Rising Deluxe Remaster v0.2.3
entry.content:
# DRAP — v1.0.0
Big update: new goals, new YAML options, area-name corrections, and quality-of-life improvements.
## Breaking — regenerate your YAMLs
Several areas were renamed to match their in-game canonical names. This changes location IDs, item IDs, and region names — **previously generated seeds will not work**.
- Grocery Store → **Seon's Food and Stuff** - Crislip's Hardware Store → **Crislip's Home Saloon** - Colby's Movie Theater → **Colby's Movieland** - Safe Room → **Security Room** - Service Hallway → **Warehouse** - Helipad → **Heliport** - Hideout → **Carlito's Hideout**
## New goal
- **Savior** — win by rescuing a configurable number of survivors (1–48). Pairs with or without ScoopSanity (when paired, main story scoops are excluded from the pool).
## New YAML options
- **Player skills as items** — 21 abilities (Zombie Ride, Power Throw, Item Toss, etc.) become AP items. - **Stat upgrades as items** — Progressive Health, Attack, Throw, Item Slot, Run, Speed. - **PP-bonus locations** — ~57 extra checks tied to PP-bonus events (microwave items, treadmills, wall plates, sandbags, display racks, etc.). - **Costume Randomizer** — three toggles: random starting outfit / re-randomize on every area transition / include DLC outfits. - **Zombie difficulty** — Night Mode + Hardcore Zombies (3× bite damage, longer aggro radius). - **Hostile Survivor Trap** — trap items that spawn 1–3 hostile NPCs at your location.
## Gameplay
- **Received Books are always-on** — book items received from AP activate their effect without consuming an inventory slot. - **EP shutter auto-trigger in ScoopSanity** — walk to a specific spot in Entrance Plaza and the shutters open on their own (no longer need to complete Backup for Brad first). - **Native in-game notifications** for AP item receives, item sends, trap triggers, and door-overlay hints — banners instead of modal popups.
## Fixes
- **ScoopSanity scoop chain** — fixed cases where critical items (e.g. Carlito's Hideout key) could be placed inside multi-event scoops the player couldn't yet reach. - **Stat upgrades on load** — speed / health / etc. now apply immediately on connect/load instead of waiting for the next level-up. - **Yellow main-scoop GUI status** — replaced with red for "next scoop, item not received." - **Beat Drivin' Carlito** marked excluded-from-progression in ScoopSanity so fill stops placing useful items there.

entry.content:
## Bugfixes
- The Clock Tower declared, “No Slime Shooter alone!” Now all checks can pass by logic well grown. - The cutscenes now shorten without infinite eggs, zipping along smoothly with no tangled pegs. - Deathlink’s less noisy when players all fall, with fewer repeat sends that once echoed call.

entry.title: Black Market of Bulletphilia ~ 100th Black Market v0.4.0
entry.content:
Archipelago Randomizer implementation for **_Black Market of Bulletphilia ~ 100th Black Market_**, also known as _**Touhou 18.5**_.
- **.apworld version:** Unstable 0.4.0 - **Minimum Archipelago Launcher version:** 0.6.7
Recommended to play on Windows, as **the game does not support Linux natively**. If playing on Linux, it is recommended to run both Archipelago Launcher and the game in Wine/Proton.
# Changelog ## Fixes - Fixed `[Ability Card Dex] Miracle Mallet` location not being detected sometimes. - Fixed Funds being reset upon connection if playing with Energy Link enabled. - Fixed slightly incorrect generation logic for boss defeats. - Moved the game's AP save data to AP's "data" folder. - Cards available in black markets **now follow the received item list (Items)** instead of the market reward list (Locations). - Changed 7-second Invincibility to be Common instead of Useful. - Adjusted generation logic to consider **Pristine Self-confidence** as an alternative to having Recommended Cards in Loadout when checking boss encounter locations. - Adjust Recommended Cards in Loadout to adapt to certain stages. - Edited docs. ## Additions - Added a generation option to scale Recommended Cards in Loadout according to applicable stages. - Added additional client settings. Can be changed via commands. - Added Challenge Market boss defeats as locations. - Added **upgradeable equipment as items**. Card slots and equip cost can be upgraded together, separately, or follow vanilla implementation. - Added more personalized Death Link messages. - Added **generic stage clears** as locations. Also added a generation option to generate only boss locations, stage clear locations, or both. - Added **Freeze Trap**. - Added **Challenge Market Clear** as a goal.
Incompatible with worlds generated before 0.4.0. Please finish previously generated worlds before playing this release.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/furret78/Archipelago/compare/unstable-0.3.3...unstable-0.4.0
# Game Details and Setup - See **game details** [here](https://github.com/furret78/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/th185/docs/en_100th%20Black%20Market.md). When exporting .yaml files for this game, it is recommended to use the Options Creator in the Archipelago Launcher for a smooth experience. - See the **setup guide** [here](https://github.com/furret78/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/th185/docs/setup_en.md).

entry.title: Hatsune Miku Project Diva Mega Mix+ v1.5.0b0
entry.content:
# Client is dead!!
### Thanks to the work of our beloved RePod, the text client is no longer needed, an in-game client is now implemented into the game mod.
## Changelog: - Fixed cases where Progressive HP would not kill - Safety timer now indefinitely shows Safety 0 instead of Safety when Prog HP is enabled - The check for reloading the game is now only checked when the game is active

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v77
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found` * avoid lag spike when loading spawn trap * "blocked" quests reappear at the Sanctuary or Southern Shelf bounty boards * reorder progressive travels * big refactor of state handling and hook signatures (just dev stuff) * rename `Chest SouthernShelf: Soaring Dragon Camp` * skip over progressive travels when regions are in remove_specific option * rework generics and add loader, crystalisk, surveyor

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.1
entry.content:
# Okami HD APWorld 0.4.1 **Important: This version requires Archipelago 0.6.7+**
# What's Changed * Add missing act 1 merchants by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/46 * Better handling Divine Retribution as a starting item by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/47 * Add Okami HD game info by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/48 * Test fix region name type issue by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/52 * fix somes locations names and logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/45 * Use rule builder to write logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/53
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.0...0.4.1

entry.title: Library of Ruina v1.0.0
entry.content:
This is a test release aimed to test (duh) the upcoming release. Many things have changed since the latest release, i might not even remember all the things myself, but i'll try to list all of them here. And please remember, that this is a test release, which means it's unfinished and highly likely very buggy.
But before everything, i'd like to thank Yar (developer of LOBAP) for help with making this release happen like a year earlier than it would have if i was working on it by myself. He made the logic from scratch after i have taken multiple attempts at it, and it seems to be working great so far. I already thanked you directly but i will do it again. Thank you.
Sorry for keeping y'all waiting.
## Changes/Additions: - Logic - Reception tree randomization - Suppressions & Realizations randomization - Server-side save file (Allows for same-slot coop) - Many new options most of which i won't list here because i'm lazy and don't remember all of them - Vanilla books are back with an actual use - Page drop system been reworked, Booster packs are back (Books of Everything DON'T work YET) - You can now set the seed for your runs if you want to try same seed again - Floors can be locked and have to be unlocked by an item - Options to guarantee some sets of Abno Pages (Exodia guarantee) - Location scouting - Deathlink (PLANNED) - In-game AP client (PLANNED) - Many more small changes
## What to look out for You can check known bugs and report bugs in #70

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.6
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v0.7.x [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md)
- Added Tower of Spirits shortcut yaml option. If enabled, enter the bottom exit in the tower to warp to the highest one you've unlocked! - Receiving the stamp book in Niko's house after getting the Niko stamp book location no longer steals your stamp book - Receiving songs in their statue rooms no longer steals your songs. - Receiving sources (or rails containing sources) in their vanilla boss rooms no longer sends their boss rewards early - Mountain Temple Snurglar door opens immediately if you've already got all the Snurglar locations (and have the keys) - Wooded Temple 3f se chest now has the correct vanilla item - Prevented pick up Alfonzo location from triggering early if previously delivered Alfonzo item to Outset - Let Mona spawn in Castle Town if you've already delivered her. - Restoration duet rewards show the correct model - Marine Temple boss key location triggers correctly if door is already open - Fixed Marine Temple boss reward sometimes not sending - Song of birds statue is still obtainable after playing Carben's song of restoration with unrandomized passengers - Can no longer play pirate hideout minigame without bow after picking up Wadatsumi/not randomizing passengers

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.29
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Added the patching plugin system
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
### Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.
